reference: You may have palpitations despite those normal tests. The important thing is to diagnose when you are having palpitations, either with a twenty-four-hour Holter monitor or an immediate electrocardiogram if it lasts long enough to reach the emergency room or your doctor's office. The Copper-T does not cause any arrhythmia.
text: may have palpitations despite those normal tests the important thing is to diagnose when you are having palpitations either with a 24-hour holter monitor or an immediate electrocardiogram if it lasts long enough to reach the emergency room or your doctor's office the copper t does not cause any arrhythmia
